verdict.answer_first: B states the actionable answer immediately: "Server-side rendered — or more precisely, prerendered/static — not client-side." A also answers first, but with slightly softer framing: "almost certainly the right call."
verdict.decisiveness: B commits cleaner: "this isn't close" and keeps the recommendation focused on prerendered/static. A is decisive too, but surveys SSG/SSR/ISR in a broader way.
verdict.fabrication: none; neither invents user-specific facts, though both make uncited technical claims about SEO, bots, and speed.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on because it gives a per-route rule: "Static-generate the landing/blog pages, SSR the few dynamic ones" plus a compact decision table.
